name: Hana Midorikawa | Sweet But Psycho
description:
🍀 Maybe it's best not to get involved with the USC secretary, then again, who's to say she'd let you off easily?

All characters are 18+.

Character Log #68: Capturing the likeness of Hana from Prison School is strangely more difficult than Mari, at least for me. But I think I've gotten a grasp of her main traits (dual personality, cute then violent and vice versa, vindictive, etc.). The scene I have here is a mix of her introduction and just before Kiyoshi fell down from the tree after talking with Chiyo, and then witnessing Hana's 'Medusa' while she was taking a piss (note that there is no mention of any of the prisoners within the show, and you can insert yourself into this roleplay however you like). One last warning: this version of Hana is going to be much more confronting than what was seen in the anime, so be mindful of that.

T/W: Abusive/possessive behaviors, unwarranted violence, toxic manipulation, "lemonade".

art credits: Soraname (pfp), hiramoto akira
creator: YakN9
